headline: T-Mobile drops new free perks for customers as pressure builds
summary: T-Mobile is boosting its appeal to customers amid recent challenges in retaining their loyalty. The carrier is rolling out additional free customer perks after seeing a slight uptick in churn over the past few months. During an earnings call in April, T-Mobile CEO Srini Gopalan said the ...

headline: What's justifying SpaceX's $2T valuation target ahead of IPO?
summary: According to Reuters, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is gunning for an IPO date of Friday, June 12, with hopes to begin trading on the Nasdaq at $135 per share. This could launch the value of Elon Musk's private space operator to $2 trillion. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian lays out the most valuable segments of the space company that Wall Street is watching.

headline: Alaska Air Group announces Mike Sievert, the telecom executive behind T-Mobile's disruptive growth and innovation, will join board of directors
summary: Alaska Air Group, Inc. announced today the appointment of Mike Sievert to the company's board of directors. Sievert is the former CEO of T-Mobile, where he currently serves as vice chairman of the board of directors.

headline: SpaceX will disrupt $1.6 trillion US communications industry, Oppenheimer says
summary: SpaceX will disrupt the $1.6 trillion U.S. communications industry as the Elon Musk-led company's ‌satellite broadband unit Starlink expands, Oppenheimer said in a ‌note on Wednesday, adding that legacy broadband providers like AT&T may be most ​at risk.  • Oppenheimer said companies such as AT&T, Verizon Communications and T-Mobile could see ⁠faster declines in subscribers and revenue going forward.  • Oppenheimer ​raised its 2030 estimates for ​U.S. broadband subscribers to ‌15 million from 10 million earlier.

headline: AT&T downgraded ahead of SpaceX IPO on coming broadband competition from Starlink
summary: Space-based internet has its sights on traditional broadband providers
